## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Knapsack and GrowthX to discuss content marketing progress and outbound strategy implementation.](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content marketing showing positive trends with 239 clicks and 22k impressions since September](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Outbound email campaign setup in progress, with warm-up phase starting soon](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=1475.0)
  - [Need to implement goal tracking in Google Analytics to measure content effectiveness](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)
  - [Focus on creating bottom-of-funnel content to drive app downloads and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/Jug5bLQVgK-uxhTdSSvJ8ZCA-A_7yF1j?tab=summary&timestamp=930.0)

## Topics

### Content Marketing Progress
